frontMatter.title: Redux-Like State Management with Sealed Class in Kotlin
frontMatter.summary: On the previous post, we already discussed how your view should have its own model. We also have discussed how you can make a simple redux-like state machine in Kotlin.

prev.title: Simple REST API with Adonis JS
prev.summary: On the last ADB meetup, we have a conversation about what framework we usually use in creating a REST API. Then, Adonis.Js is being mentioned. I know Adonis but haven't got a chance to test it, so let's test it now!

next.title: Android Arch's Room - Introduction
next.summary: My first reaction when Android Architecture Component is out is just **meh..** I mean come on, the ViewModel is heavily tied to Activity and Fragment and basically i don't need it because i use Conductor…
